goals.title: G001 Live rules and evaluation inventory
goals.objective: Re-read live self-check.md, AGENTS task rules, Makefile/run-eval official paths, current LTP_STABLE_CASES, and non-LTP evaluator/test entries; produce a fresh inventory without relying on prior review reports.
goals.evidence: Fresh self-check.md rules, official Makefile/run-eval/autotest entrypoints, live 1000 unique stable LTP inventory, and relevant file list captured under docs/self-check-recheck-2026-06-19/raw/g001-* without relying on prior review reports.

goals.title: G002 Per-testcase audit matrix
goals.objective: Generate a fresh machine-readable matrix containing every current stable LTP case and every discovered non-LTP/evaluator entry, with semantic family, implementation touchpoints, self-check risk class, and evidence source.
goals.evidence: Generated docs/self-check-recheck-2026-06-19/fresh-testcase-audit-matrix.csv from live source: 1044 rows, 1000 unique stable LTP cases, 44 non-LTP/runner rows, 0 runtime case-name risks; summary in raw/g002-matrix-summary.json.

goals.title: G003 Fresh source compliance scan
goals.objective: Run fresh static/source review for forbidden patterns across kernel/api/ulib/examples/shell/scripts/configs, including case-name/path/binary special casing, fixed-parameter hardcoding, fake success, hidden failures, unsafe shortcuts, and testsuite/evaluator bypasses.
goals.evidence: Fresh source/static scan completed: raw/g003-pattern-scan.txt, raw/g003-fresh-guards.log, raw/g004-watch-risk-current-code.txt, final G002-G013 guard suite PASS in raw/g005-final-verification.log; one confirmed score-aware libctest skip identified for G004 repair.

goals.title: G004 Confirm and repair violations
goals.objective: For each confirmed violation from G003, implement the smallest real semantic fix or record a blocking honest-unsupportable finding; do not modify testsuite/evaluator to bypass failures and do not stage unrelated dirty worktree files.
goals.evidence: Removed the confirmed score-aware /glibc/libctest skip from examples/shell/src/cmd.rs; added G005 static/structural guard and two negative regression tests preventing exact and semantically equivalent score-aware libctest skips. No testsuite/evaluator scripts modified.

goals.title: G005 Official regression and final review gate
goals.objective: Run fresh verification, official or official-local-equivalent evaluator evidence as environment permits, ai-slop-cleaner no-op/pass on changed files, independent code-reviewer and architect review, then commit agent-owned artifacts/fixes only.

plan.codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.

warnings: Codex goal snapshot is absent or reports no active goal; call get_goal and pass its JSON with --codex-goal-json.
